description: An LPG cylinder blast caused a single-storey house to collapse in Delhi's Mukundpur area on Tuesday morning. Several residents are feared trapped under the debris. Rescue teams were immediately dispatched to the scene to launch operations following the incident.

description: An IRGC-linked operative, Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi, pleaded not guilty to terrorism charges in Manhattan, accused of plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump and orchestrating global attacks. He claimed innocence, stating, "Our children are being killed by your rockets." The indictment details alleged bombings and planned attacks, with potential life sentences.

title: FEMA case: ED conducts searches against Vedanta Group
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has initiated searches against the Vedanta Group as part of a Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) investigation. The action against the mining conglomerate, promoted by Anil Agarwal, commenced on Monday. Further details regarding the ongoing FEMA probe are yet to be disclosed by the central agency.

The operation aimed to enhance public safety by enforcing immigration laws and identifying undocumented drivers operating heavy vehicles.

description: The Dallas Cowboys and Philadelphia Eagles were among the teams linked to former Cleveland Browns star Myles Garrett before the Los Angeles Rams completed a blockbuster trade. Cleveland received rising pass rusher Jared Verse, a 2027 first-round pick, and additional draft assets. Garrett, whose contract is worth roughly $160 million, is expected to receive a new deal in Los Angeles as the Rams strengthen their championship hopes.

description: Taylor Swift’s upcoming wedding to Travis Kelce has sparked renewed attention on some of her high-profile friendships. Reports claim Swift has grown distant from former close friend Karlie Kloss, while her relationship with Blake Lively remains under scrutiny following the actress’s legal dispute with Justin Baldoni. Punjab drug smugglers throw cash to foil police chase, held after encounter
description: A dramatic chase in Sonbhadra led to the arrest of a Punjab-based drug smuggler, Prince, who was shot in the leg. He and his accomplice attempted to evade police by throwing cash and ramming vehicles. Recovered items include 3 kg opium, 225 kg doda, and Rs 50,000 cash, valued at Rs 58.75 lakh. His accomplice escaped.

Google plans to release 32mn Wolbachia-infected mosquitoes across Florida, California
description: Alphabet's Debug initiative is seeking EPA approval to release 32 million specially treated male mosquitoes in California and Florida. This innovative approach uses Wolbachia bacteria to sterilize wild Culex mosquitoes, aiming to significantly reduce the spread of diseases like West Nile virus. Advanced AI and robotics are enabling this large-scale effort, with trials planned over two years.
